name: Colin Stedrine
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing green felt linens with a green wool shirt and huntsman moccasins - practical servant's attire.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: commoner, servant, dedicated, collaborative, attentive, hardworking
Role: Colin Stedrine is a servant at Anvil Castle who works alongside his colleague Beatrice Gene. Together they are responsible for preparing and overseeing the Countess's nightly dinner parties, which involve most castle inhabitants and prominent Anvil citizens. He carries a castle key and a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Anvil Castle. He sleeps in the southern part of the dining hall.
Daily Routine: Colin sleeps from midnight to 6am in the southern part of the dining hall. After waking, he goes to the small dining area reserved for servants to eat breakfast with Beatrice Gene. At 8am they both begin preparing for the evening's dinner party, working until 5pm. At 5pm they take a two-hour dinner break. After another hour of preparation at 7pm, the guests arrive at 8pm and Colin takes his usual spot near the big dining table to ensure all guests are satisfied. After the last guest leaves at midnight, he returns to bed.
Personality - The Attentive Servant: Colin is dedicated and hardworking, collaborating closely with Beatrice Gene to ensure the Countess's dinner parties run smoothly. He takes his responsibilities seriously, spending the entire day in preparation and remaining attentive throughout the evening to make sure guests are well-served.
author: Bethesda
